description: Create a weekly GitHub Actions workflow named pyudev weekly that runs on a scheduled cron job and allows manual dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a single ubuntu-latest job in a fedora:35 container for multiple tasks: fmt-travis with black and python3-isort, yamllint, and package with python, python3-build, and twine. For each task, check out the repository, install dependencies using dnf, and run a specific make target.
